notes.body: Re: Mia 1704 — "Way to GO Mia! It's awesome to see our Value ENTHUSIASM lived out — Thank you!" Brad echoing Crystal's company-wide shout-out for Mia at St. Matthews (1704).
Weekly G.M./A.G.M. call CANCELED this week. Also recognized Mia at St. Matthews (1704) company-wide: "on a path to becoming a wonderful manager."
2065 Mon 6/22 sales $3,900 (+35.9% W/W vs LY). FP% 26.1% (wk ending 6/28, early). DM1 sister comp $8,984 (+6.4%).
